name: Button
description: Buttons let operators trigger actions — saving a vehicle, running a report, confirming a change. Emphasis communicates priority: the one most important action on a view is the contained button; everything else steps down.
keyRule: Use exactly one contained (high-emphasis) button per view. The floating action button (FAB) is excluded — it's a mobile pattern; on desktop the primary action sits in the page toolbar / app bar.

variants.name: Contained
variants.whenToUse: The single primary action on a view (Save, Add, Run).

variants.name: Outlined
variants.whenToUse: Important secondary actions, or "Cancel" next to a contained button.

variants.name: Text
variants.whenToUse: Low-emphasis actions — in toolbars, cards, and dialog dismissals.

variants.name: Toggle button(s)
variants.whenToUse: Switch between exclusive views (Map / List); 2–5 options, not navigation.

anatomy.name: Container
anatomy.description: the clickable surface; fill/border depends on emphasis.

anatomy.name: Label
anatomy.description: a short, verb-first action (e.g. "Add vehicle"), uppercase in MD2.

behaviors.name: Emphasis
behaviors.description: Use the lowest emphasis that does the job. Multiple contained buttons compete and dilute the primary action.

behaviors.name: Loading
behaviors.description: For async actions, disable the button and show a small spinner in place of the label; never let it be clicked twice.

behaviors.name: Icon + label
behaviors.description: Pair a leading icon with the label for frequent actions; keep the label even with an icon (icon-only goes to an icon button with a tooltip).

states.treatment: Contained darkens to primary-dark; outlined/text show a light primary tint.
12% black fill, 38% black label, no shadow, not clickable.

specs.value: primary / white — use primary-dark (#BB4800) for the fill where white text must pass WCAG AA; white on #F47735 is only ~2.79:1

props.name: label
props.description: Short, verb-first action label (e.g. "Add vehicle"). Rendered uppercase per MD2.

props.name: variant
props.description: Contained = single primary action per view. Outlined = important secondary actions. Text = low-emphasis actions.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Optional leading icon — a registered FontAwesome icon name (see Icon.doc.json), not a Material icon ligature. Keep the label even with an icon.

props.name: loading
props.description: Disables the button and shows a spinner in place of the label for async actions.

doThis: Keep one contained action per view.
Darken the orange fill for legible white text.
dontDoThis: Don't use a button for navigation that's really a link.
Don't ship white-on-orange for important labels.
Don't hard-code colours/sizes — use tokens + these specs.
accessibility: Buttons are real <button> elements with discernible text.
Disabled buttons are conveyed to assistive tech.
Labels read as actions, not vague words.

related.name: Menu
related.why: Group secondary commands behind an overflow menu

related.name: Icon
related.why: leadingIcon takes a registered FontAwesome name, not a Material ligature
